Trait: Paranoid — trusts no one, double-checks every exit
Violent — first instinct is always to break things
Reckless — the plan is: go fast, figure it out later
Meticulous — can't leave a system unoptimized
Haunted — can't stop thinking about who you used to be
Greedy — everything has a price, including you
Nihilistic — nothing matters, but you keep moving
Loyal — to the wrong people, always
Broken — something fundamental snapped, long ago
Ruthless — collateral damage is just math
Curious — digs into things better left buried
Detached — feels everything from a distance
Appearance: Subdermal LED implants pulse in your cheeks
One eye replaced with a matte-black optical implant
Neck-to-wrist tattoos of corrupted corporate logos
Half your scalp is shaved; the rest is wire-threaded dreadlocks
Chrome-capped fingers clack on every surface
A deep scar runs from your temple to your chin
Your skin is pale and almost translucent from years underground
Augmented jaw gives you an unsettling too-wide smile
Oversized coat hides the fact that one arm is entirely synthetic
Permanent dark circles — you don't sleep much
Military-grade prosthetic legs, slightly too long
Burn scars cover the left side of your face and neck
Retractable subdermal blades, visible as faint lines on your forearms
Cheap wetware port behind your ear, jury-rigged with silver tape
Both hands are slightly too perfect — you had them replaced
Glitch: Sporadic audio hallucinations — voices, music, static
Occasional motor stutter — your hand freezes for a second
Random memory gaps — hours of your life, just gone
Involuntary data-dump — you recite network logs mid-sentence
Light sensitivity — everything above 60% brightness is agony
Phantom pain in the limb you no longer have
Emotional blunting — you know you should feel something, but don't
Persistent heads-up overlay you can't disable
Sleep dysfunction — you crash for 18 hours or not at all
Tic loop — you repeat a word or motion under stress
Chronic low-level fever from infected wetware
Optical flicker — your vision stutters in bright light
Signal bleed — you pick up other people's comms involuntarily
Neural lag — two-second delay between thought and action
Involuntary system scan — you analyze strangers' threat levels obsessively
